endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.StreamAnalytics/streamingjobs/{jobName}/outputs
endpoints.description: Lists all of the outputs under the specified streaming job.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{JOBNAME}} with a real jobname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.StreamAnalytics/streamingjobs/{jobName}/outputs/{outputName}
endpoints.description: Gets details about the specified output.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{JOBNAME}} with a real jobname. Replace {{OUTPUTNAME}} with a real outputname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.StreamAnalytics/streamingjobs/{jobName}/outputs/{outputName}
endpoints.description: Creates an output or replaces an already existing output under an existing streaming job.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{JOBNAME}} with a real jobname. Replace {{OUTPUTNAME}} with a real outputname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.StreamAnalytics/streamingjobs/{jobName}/outputs/{outputName}
endpoints.description: Deletes an output from the streaming job.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{JOBNAME}} with a real jobname. Replace {{OUTPUTNAME}} with a real outputname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: PATCH /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.StreamAnalytics/streamingjobs/{jobName}/outputs/{outputName}
endpoints.description: Updates an existing output under an existing streaming job. This can be used to partially update (ie. update one or two properties) an output without affecting the rest the job or output definition.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{JOBNAME}} with a real jobname. Replace {{OUTPUTNAME}} with a real outputname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.StreamAnalytics/streamingjobs/{jobName}/outputs/{outputName}/test
endpoints.description: Tests whether an output’s datasource is reachable and usable by the Azure Stream Analytics service.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{JOBNAME}} with a real jobname. Replace {{OUTPUTNAME}} with a real outputname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.
